title: Nova Commerce
shortDescription: E-commerce web app with modular storefront, optimized checkout and reliable payments.

sections.overview: Nova Commerce is a premium storefront platform designed for fast browsing and frictionless conversion.
sections.problem: The previous site had low conversion and heavy templates that slowed down product exploration.
sections.solution: I rebuilt the storefront as a component-driven web app with fast product rendering and resilient checkout flows.
architecture: Order service with idempotent payment handling
results: Fewer support tickets related to ordering

title: Pulse Analytics
shortDescription: SaaS analytics dashboard that centralizes KPIs with drill-down workflows.

sections.overview: Pulse helps operations and leadership teams monitor business health in real time.
sections.problem: Teams used spreadsheets and disconnected reports, delaying decisions and creating data trust issues.
sections.solution: I designed a consistent dashboard UI and reusable chart modules backed by a performant aggregation API.
results: Daily decision cadence replaced weekly reporting
Onboarding for analysts reduced by half
Leadership adopted one source of truth

title: Helios CMS
shortDescription: Multi-site headless CMS web platform with governance and publishing controls.

sections.overview: Helios unified fragmented editorial workflows into one reliable CMS experience.
sections.problem: Content teams lacked approval workflows and had no consistent publishing model.
sections.solution: I created schema-driven APIs, revisions, and role permissions for secure multi-site publishing.
architecture: Headless content API for multiple frontends

title: Harbor Bookings
shortDescription: Booking web app with real-time availability and automated confirmations.

sections.overview: Harbor modernized reservations with self-service scheduling and reliable reminders.
sections.problem: Manual reservation management caused double-bookings and delayed responses.
sections.solution: I built the booking flow, availability engine and calendar sync workers for conflict-free scheduling.
architecture: Web client connected to reservation API

title: Lumen Showcase
shortDescription: Editorial landing system for campaigns with reusable blocks and SEO automation.

sections.overview: Lumen enables marketing teams to launch consistent, high-performing campaign pages quickly.
sections.problem: Landing pages were hardcoded and expensive to maintain across launches.
sections.solution: I created a modular frontend architecture with CMS-driven block composition and analytics hooks.
architecture: Analytics events sent to BI pipeline
